<Source processed / pages added / fix.>

## Editorial checklist

- [ ] Names and figures **verified** against primary sources (or omitted)
- [ ] Semi-private sources **cited, not republished** (no hyperlink for group-shared docs)
- [ ] No AI attribution in pages or commit trailers; no raw SVG / AI brand assets
- [ ] New pages **wired into the sidebar** (`astro.config.mjs`) and the section **overview page**
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Source's `content-backlog` issue opened/updated; queue line moved to **Processed**
